title: Opening for Medical Officer at LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India:
LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India!
